models.name: tbl_tmx_userrequiredact_sumtotal
models.description: This table tracks required learning assignments for users. It contains all mandatory and recommended learning activities assigned to specific users, including due dates, completion status, and assignment details. This is the table for finding what learning activities a user is required to complete. Use this table when you need to: 1. Find what learning activities are assigned to a user, 2. Track mandatory vs. optional learning assignments, 3. Check due dates and completion status of user assignments, 4. Generate compliance reports for required training, 5. Send notifications for overdue assignments, 6. Manage learning deadlines and expiration dates, 7. Track certification requirements and renewals, 8. Generate manager reports on team learning assignments.

properties.description: Foreign key reference to the person_sumtotal table, linking user activities to specific employees.
Foreign key referencing the activity_sumtotal table associated with user-required actions.
Indicates the current state of a user-required action in the system. THe value is 1 for active and 0 for inactive.
Status of the notification related to user-required activities.
Indicates the current status of user's activity-assignment. This has ENrolled, Assigned, In Progress, Completed, Overdue, Expired.
The primary status of the user's assignment, indicating their progress (e.g., 'Assigned', 'In Progress', 'Overdue', 'Completed').
The deadline by which the user is required to complete this learning assignment.
The date when a user-required action is set to expire. Referenced as Expiration date.
The date when a notification is planned to be sent, represented as a string in timestamp format without time zone.
The date by which a notification related to user-required activities is due.
Indicates whether the user is satisfied with the activity or requirement.
Indicates whether a specific activity is required for the user.
Indicates whether whether the activity is a certification or not.
Timestamp indicating the last time the record was updated.

This table tracks required learning assignments for users. It contains all mandatory and recommended learning activities assigned to specific users, including due dates, completion status, and assignment details. This is the table for finding what learning activities a user is required to complete.
queryPatterns: Find all required learning activities for a specific user (empfk)
Identify mandatory vs. optional learning assignments (isrequired)
Track completion status and due dates of user assignments
Filter assignments by activityfk (join tbl_tmx_activity_sumtotal) for course-specific requirements
Monitor notification status for overdue assignments
useCases: Compliance Reporting: Generate reports on mandatory training completion and compliance status
Learning Path Management: Define and track required learning paths for individual users
Overdue Management: Identify and notify users with overdue learning assignments
Certification Tracking: Monitor certification requirements and renewals for users
Managerial Oversight: Provide managers with insights into their team's required learning activities
